userDefinedField.fieldValue: MW id 1 Not possible in VCON to have Mutual breaks
MW id 6 Not possible in VCON to Float Float XXCY
Pay EUR EURIBOR 6M on floating leg 3,900,000 Receive USD LIBOR 3M on floating leg 3,453,097 Expiry 26 jun 2018
EMIR Eligible.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
